library_preparation_preflight.summary: No extra deterministic setup is needed. The 1.11.1 artifact is a Maven SCM Git executable provider whose compile/runtime dependencies are supplied transitively; the reported failure is an API signature change in GitTagCommand.createCommandLine requiring the new boolean sign parameter, not a missing dependency, Docker service, environment variable, or system property.
risks: Tests that execute real Git operations, rather than only command-line construction and output consumers, depend on a git executable being available on PATH and may require temporary repository setup such as user.name/user.email for commits or tags.

Network-backed Git operations such as ls-remote, clone, pull, or push should be avoided unless explicitly needed because they introduce flakiness; meaningful coverage can be reached with local temp directories, command-line factories, and consumer parsing.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8274 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.apache.maven.scm:maven-scm-provider-gitexe:1.11.1; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015
